bupt.ta.service

类 AdminService

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.service.AdminService

  • public class AdminService
extends java.lang.Object
    Shared admin analytics and workload-enforcement logic.

    • 嵌套类概要

      嵌套类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      static class  AdminService.AdminApplicationRow
      Application row on an admin detail view.
      static class  AdminService.ApplicationAlert
      Application data anomaly flagged for admin review.
      static class  AdminService.CapacityAlert
      Job posting that has reached its selection capacity.
      static class  AdminService.DashboardSummary
      Aggregate counts for the admin dashboard.
      static class  AdminService.InterviewNoticeAlert
      Application in interview stage missing expected notice fields.
      static class  AdminService.LimitAlert
      TA who is at or over the configured workload cap.
      static class  AdminService.MODetailReport
      Full admin read-only report for one module organiser.
      static class  AdminService.MOJobDetailRow
      One job row on an MO admin detail view.
      static class  AdminService.MonitoringReport
      Aggregated alerts for the admin monitoring dashboard.
      static class  AdminService.TADetailReport
      Full admin read-only report for one TA.
      static class  AdminService.UserDirectoryReport
      Filtered user list with per-role activity metrics.
      static class  AdminService.UserListRow
      One row in the admin user directory.
      static class  AdminService.WorkloadRow
      TA workload summary for the admin workload page.

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static java.lang.String STATUS_AUTO_CLOSED
      Application status set when workload rules auto-close excess selections.

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      AdminService() 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 静态方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      AdminService.DashboardSummary buildDashboardSummary(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
      Computes dashboard totals and workload-cap indicators.
      AdminService.MODetailReport buildMODetailReport(DataStorage storage, java.lang.String userId)
      Builds the admin read-only report for one module organiser.
      AdminService.MonitoringReport buildMonitoringReport(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
      Builds anomaly and capacity alerts for the admin monitoring page.
      AdminService.TADetailReport buildTADetailReport(DataStorage storage, java.lang.String userId)
      Builds the admin read-only report for one TA.
      AdminService.UserDirectoryReport buildUserDirectoryReport(DataStorage storage, java.lang.String roleFilter, java.lang.String query)
      Builds a filterable user directory with per-role activity metrics.
      java.util.List<AdminService.WorkloadRow> buildWorkloadRows(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
      Lists each TA's selected workload for the admin workload page.
      int enforceWorkloadLimitForApplicant(DataStorage storage, java.lang.String applicantId, java.lang.String keepApplicationId, AdminSettings settings)
      Auto-closes excess SELECTED applications for one TA down to the configured cap.
      int enforceWorkloadLimitGlobally(DataStorage storage, AdminSettings settings)
      Applies workload-cap enforcement for every TA; returns total auto-closed count.
      static java.lang.String normalizeStatus(java.lang.String status)
      Normalizes application status strings for comparisons and reporting.
      double sumSelectedWorkloadHours(DataStorage storage, java.lang.String applicantId)
      Sums estimated hours across a TA's SELECTED applications.
      boolean wouldExceedWorkloadLimitOnSelect(DataStorage storage, java.lang.String applicantId, Job job, AdminSettings settings)
      Returns true when selecting this applicant for job would meet or exceed the admin workload cap.

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      • STATUS_AUTO_CLOSED

        public static final java.lang.String STATUS_AUTO_CLOSED
        Application status set when workload rules auto-close excess selections.
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

                                       java.lang.String applicantId)
                                throws java.io.IOException

      • wouldExceedWorkloadLimitOnSelect

        public boolean wouldExceedWorkloadLimitOnSelect(DataStorage storage,
                                                java.lang.String applicantId,
                                                Job job,
                                                AdminSettings settings)
                                         throws java.io.IOException
        Returns true when selecting this applicant for job would meet or exceed the admin workload cap.
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException

      • enforceWorkloadLimitForApplicant

        public int enforceWorkloadLimitForApplicant(DataStorage storage,
                                            java.lang.String applicantId,
                                            java.lang.String keepApplicationId,
                                            AdminSettings settings)
                                     throws java.io.IOException
        Auto-closes excess SELECTED applications for one TA down to the configured cap.
        返回:
        number of applications auto-closed
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException

      • enforceWorkloadLimitGlobally

        public int enforceWorkloadLimitGlobally(DataStorage storage,
                                        AdminSettings settings)
                                 throws java.io.IOException
        Applies workload-cap enforcement for every TA; returns total auto-closed count.
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException
